framingZh: 构图跟着这个瞬间走，让同一个瞬间里的动作和现场先成立。
framingEn: close-up of the chair back, showing the hand placing the bag strap and the discovered chalk piece in the wood grain
mustShowZh: 嵌在缝隙里的蓝色粉笔头
搭在椅背上的书包带子
mustShowEn: texture of dark wooden chair back
small broken blue chalk piece embedded in wood grain
school bag strap draped over the chair back
mayShowZh: 一小缕头发或红色发夹的暗示
mayShowEn: fingers or edge of sleeve touching the chair
hint of hair or the small red hairclip
blurred background of classroom back row
mustAvoidZh: 将瞬间重写成人物互动
mustAvoidEn: rewriting the moment into a person interacting
atmosphereZh: 像顺手留下的一段真实生活
altTextZh: 璃音发现教室椅背木纹里嵌着一小截蓝色粉笔头的瞬间
